problem id: 73d0b62c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10011101 -> 01010011
  00101111 -> 11000101
  11111011 -> 11011111
  01101111 -> 11001101
  10010001 -> 01010010
  10010110 -> 10010010
  11000010 -> 10011000
  00011011 -> 11000011
  10010000 -> 00010010

query: 00111010
predicted answer: 10000111
